parameters.name: id
parameters.description: only list the report with this id

parameters.name: predefinedReason
parameters.description: predefined reason the listed reports should contain

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: plain search that will match with video titles, reporter names and more

parameters.name: searchReporter
parameters.description: only list reports of a specific reporter

parameters.name: searchReportee
parameters.description: only list reports of a specific reportee

parameters.name: searchVideo
parameters.description: only list reports of a specific video

parameters.name: searchVideoChannel
parameters.description: only list reports of a specific video channel

parameters.name: videoIs
parameters.description: only list deleted or blocklisted videos

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: only list account, comment or video reports
